outreach_draft.subject: Post-Judgment Gatekeeper Recovery — Chinese-Registered Entity — Offshore Fraud Judgment
outreach_draft.body:
Dear Ms. Brown,

I am reaching out in connection with a judgment monetization matter that closely mirrors the offshore fraud recovery model your team at BakerHostetler has executed at scale.

Our client holds an uncollected fraud judgment against an offshore foreign corporation (Chinese-registered entity). The defendant has no reachable assets. The recovery opportunity lies with the gatekeepers — auditors, financial institutions, and professional advisors positioned to identify or prevent the fraud. Settlement leverage, not direct litigation against the debtor, is the preferred recovery path.

Your work as principal deputy to Irving Picard in the Madoff SIPA matter — tracing and recovering billions across a global network of financial institution gatekeepers — reflects directly relevant expertise. BakerHostetler's broader international asset tracing and offshore fraud recovery experience, including matters exceeding $500M, confirms strong structural alignment.

I would welcome a brief preliminary conversation to explore mutual interest and fit. No commitment implied. Case details available upon request.

Sincerely,

Corporate X-Factor Operations
Judgment Monetization Group
corporatezfactor.com

optimizations_applied: Direct email found: sbrown@bakerlaw.com (was: firm website contact)
Added Madoff SIPA role — stronger credibility signal than generic $860M citation
Subject line updated to emphasize Chinese-registered entity (matches Brown's offshore experience)
